mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( user_id, title, content, cover_url, type, video_url, location, status, published_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{coverUrl}, #{type}, #{videoUrl}, #{location}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1), COALESCE(#{publishedAt}, NOW()) )
INSERT INTO post_images (post_id, url, sort_order) VALUES (#{postId}, #{url}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.type, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.collect_count AS collectCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1
AND p.id IN (SELECT pt.post_id FROM post_tags pt WHERE pt.tag_id = #{tagId})
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p WHERE p.status = 1
AND p.id IN (SELECT pt.post_id FROM post_tags pt WHERE pt.tag_id = #{tagId})
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.cover_url, p.type, p.video_url, p.location, p.status, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.collect_count, p.share_count, p.created_at, p.published_at, p.user_id, u.username, u.avatar_url, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND followee_id = p.user_id ) AS is_followed FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND (p.status = 1 OR p.user_id = #{currentUserId})
SELECT id, url, sort_order, width, height FROM post_images WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT t.id, t.name FROM post_tags pt JOIN tags t ON pt.tag_id = t.id WHERE pt.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (user_id, target_type, target_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId})
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET collect_count = collect_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET collect_count = collect_count - 1 WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT cp.collection_id FROM collection_posts cp JOIN collections c ON cp.collection_id = c.id WHERE cp.post_id = #{postId} AND c.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT cp.collection_id AS collectionId, c.user_id AS userId FROM collection_posts cp JOIN collections c ON c.id = cp.collection_id WHERE cp.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM collection_posts WHERE collection_id = #{collectionId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.type, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.collect_count AS collectCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.type, p.status, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.collect_count AS collectCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 0 AND p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p WHERE p.status = 0 AND p.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.type, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.collect_count AS collectCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = 1 AND target_id = p.id ) AS isLiked, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM collection_posts cp JOIN collections c ON cp.collection_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND cp.post_id = p.id ) AS isCollected FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.user_id IN ( SELECT followee_id FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.type, p.video_url AS videoUrl, p.location, p.status, p.is_top AS isTop, p.is_essence AS isEssence, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.collect_count AS collectCount, p.share_count AS shareCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.published_at AS publishedAt, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_status_log (post_id, operator_id, from_status, to_status, reason) VALUES (#{postId}, #{operatorId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM posts WHERE id = #{postId}
